composite_description: Sharp drawdown in bear market -- near-term noisy, 60d edge solid. Size smaller. All three assets confirm the drawdown.
brief:
Signal: Buy on sharp drawdown in bear market; expect 60d edge, near-term volatility.

All three assets—BTC, ETH, SOL—register deep drawdowns (z < –2.8), confirming the signal. We are in BEAR phase (below 200d MA, high confidence). Backtest on 84 comparable days yields median +0.5% at 7d, –1.1% at 14d, –0.5% at 30d, then +5.0% at 60d. The 60d edge is solid; near-term is noisy. Position sizing should reflect this asymmetry. Fear & Greed at 8 is extreme; funding rate (–6.8% annualized) shows capitulation but carries no predictive edge at 14d/30d per backtest.

Supporting data: BTC's 5d z-score of –3.02 and ETH's –2.80 both exceed the deep-drawdown threshold. Total market cap at $2.24T and BTC dominance stable at 56.1% suggest broad liquidation rather than selective weakness. Expect consolidation risk through the second and third weeks; conviction builds after day 40 if the bear structure holds.
